summary: Both MVP changes delivered and QA-passed. p2-c007 (OpenApiCompiler) replaced the todo!() startup panic with a full 3.1.0 document generator and wired GET /openapi.json. p2-c006 (PgVectorRpc) added VectorRpcRequest domain type, PgVectorRpc adapter with SQL injection guard, and POST /rpc/vector with full 6-GUC RLS context. All workspace tests pass; cargo clippy -D warnings clean.

ci_gate.cargo_clippy_D_warnings: PASS (fixed redundant closure in PgVectorRpc row serializer)
